assistant_message: I don't have specific information about events tailored exclusively for software developers in the current data. The event aims to bring together individuals interested in AI engineering to learn and collaborate. Would you like to register for this event or get more details?
Please provide your email address so I can register you for the AI Engineering Bootcamp.
You have been successfully registered for the AI Engineering Bootcamp. A confirmation email has been sent to ukadavid7@gmail.com. Enjoy the event!
